summary: Full kiosk auto-rotation feature testing (backend + frontend). All 6 backend tests and all 5 frontend kiosk scenarios passed.
seed_data_creation: Set kiosk_enabled=true, kiosk_interval=10 via PUT /api/settings for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kiosk feature fully verified. kiosk_enabled=true, kiosk_interval=10 currently saved in MongoDB. All kiosk scenarios pass: toggle in settings, countdown timer, progress bar, pause/resume, auto-rotation from /dashboard to /wazuh in 10s.

verified_requirements.settings_save_persists: PASS - GET /api/settings after save returns kiosk_enabled=true, kiosk_interval=10
verified_requirements.topnav_countdown: PASS - data-testid='kiosk-countdown' counts down from interval (9s, 6s...)
verified_requirements.topnav_progress_bar: PASS - data-testid='kiosk-progress-bar' visible at bottom of nav
verified_requirements.pause_stops_countdown: PASS - countdown freezes when paused, PAUSED text shown
verified_requirements.pause_btn_text_change: PASS - button changes PAUSE → RESUME when paused
verified_requirements.resume_restarts_countdown: PASS - countdown resumes after clicking RESUME
verified_requirements.settings_persist_across_nav: PASS - kiosk controls appear on dashboard because settings loaded from backend on mount
